description: Letter fragment (lower right of recto, lower left of verso). The script appears late. The legible part of recto is mostly occupied with pious quotations. The legible part of verso is mostly closing blessings, including to אלסיד אלואלד יל (the writer's father may he live forever). ASE.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
